title: mellow-romantic-german-beef-roast
description: A citrusy, pillowy, romantic German dish featuring clear honey, roast, and is fodmap-friendly. Perfect for a cozy evening with loved ones.
instructions: Rub the beef roast with salt, black pepper, and thyme.
In a large bowl, whisk together orange juice, lemon juice, ginger, and garlic. Add the sliced onion and mix well.
Place the beef roast in a large roasting pan and brush the onion mixture all over it.
Add the bay leaves, potatoes, and carrots to the roasting pan.

Roast in the preheated oven for 20 minutes, then reduce the temperature to 180°C (350°F) and continue roasting for another 2 hours, or until the beef is tender and the internal temperature reaches 63°C (145°F).
Baste the beef with the pan juices every 30 minutes.
Remove the beef from the oven and let it rest for 10 minutes before slicing.
Strain the pan juices and discard the bay leaves and thyme.
Serve the beef with the pan juices spooned over the top, garnished with fresh herbs if desired.
Heat the clear honey in a small saucepan over low heat until warm and runny.
Brush the warm honey over the sliced beef before serving.
Garnish with fresh herbs and serve with additional pan juices on the side, if desired.
